title: viola × mira
intro: Viola × mira, also known as the hybrid viola or pinks, is a type of flowering plant that is a cross between Viola sororia and Viola riviniana. The plant is rich in medicinal properties, particularly in its leaves and flowers, which contain bioactive compounds such as flavonoids and anthocyanins. The health benefits of Viola × mira include its anti-inflammatory, antioxidant, and antimicrobial properties, which can help to alleviate symptoms of anxiety, insomnia, and digestive issues. Viola × mira can be prepared in various herbal forms, including teas, infusions, and tinctures, which can be used to support overall well-being and promote relaxation.
